description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Core that triggers on push events. Use a matrix strategy to run a build job on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-latest) and Python versions (2.7, 3.7). For each job, check out the code, set up the corresponding Python version, install dependencies with pip and tox, run Python lint and integration tests with tox, and send a Slack notification on failure.
